title: Current CM Parameters
description: I think at this point, people have a pretty good idea of how to train for the Champions Meetings. There are lots of guide makers now. It’s not like on JP where I was one of the only people posting stuff in English. You can refer to like, MooMooCows’s YouTube channel or something for recommendations.
html: I think at this point, people have a pretty good idea of how to train for the Champions Meetings. There are lots of guide makers now. It’s not like on JP where I was one of the only people posting stuff in English. You can refer to like, MooMooCows’s YouTube channel or something for recommendations.
